title: Friend Requests II: Who Has the Most Friends
input_format: Table: RequestAccepted with columns requester_id (int), accepter_id (int), accept_date (date)
output_format: Result table with columns id and num showing the person with the most friends and their friend count
constraints:
- There are no duplicate accepted friend requests
- requester_id != accepter_id
- Each row represents a unique accepted friend request
